title: Butler
description: Butler adds a command-palette style search to Minecraft. Quickly find items and recipes without digging through menus.
body:
## 🧑‍🍳 Butler Mod – Current Features

**Butler** adds a lightweight command-palette experience to Minecraft, focused on **finding items faster and understanding recipes better**.

### 📖 Recipe Lookup

Search for recipes directly from the Butler interface. Perfect when you know _what_ you want, but not _how_ to craft it.

### 🔌 JEI Integration (Optional)

If **Just Enough Items (JEI)** is installed:

*   Butler uses JEI’s recipe viewer
*   Recipes are shown with full JEI detail and accuracy

If JEI is **not** installed:

*   Recipe search is available
*   No recipe view is shown yet

### 🧠 Focused & Non-Intrusive

Butler does one thing well: **speed up your workflow without changing how Minecraft feels.**

More features will come. For now, Butler stays fast, simple, and reliable.
